title: lippia lantanoides
intro: Lippia lantanoides, also known as wild basil, is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lippia lantanoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for local use, or processed into essential oils and extracts for commercial applications.
